original_request_verbatim: An internal tool for our ops team to create, edit and track vendor records with roles and an audit log.
interpreted_business_objective: Give the ops team a governed system of record for vendors with role-based access and full auditability.
problem_being_solved: Vendor data lives in spreadsheets with no roles or audit trail.
desired_outcome: A reliable internal vendor registry with RBAC and audit history.
definition_of_success: Ops can CRUD vendors under RBAC; every change is audited; all acceptance criteria pass.
